title: AL's 3D Potions
description: A pack that makes Potions and Bottles 3D!
body:
![AL's 3D Potions logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba8514cd5fdf140728f2ef7508cdf17a4c671723.png)

# 

This custom item pack makes Potions and Bottles have 3D models!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eWxR64Q2RBI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The designs of the new models were partially inspired by Minecraft Dungeons so as to be as vanilla friendly as possible while still being fresh and new!

This pack can work in completely vanilla Minecraft which means OptiFine is NOT required.

 

**This pack gives 3D models to:**

-Potions

-Splash Potions

-Lingering Potions

-Glass Bottles

-Honey Bottles

-Dragon's Breath

-Bottle o' Enchanting

-Ominous Bottle

 


 

**This pack also has a lot of built-in Mod and Resource Pack compatibility features!**

 

Mod compatibility:

-[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight/versions)

-[Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries/version/107)

 

Resource Pack compatibility:

-[Theone's Eating Animation Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theones-eating-animation-pack) (1.21.2+ only)

-[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

-[AL's Raid Captains](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/als-raid-captains)
